teamPage.skills.title: Skills
teamPage.systemPrompt.desc: Define responsibilities, boundaries, and working style.
teamPage.systemPrompt.placeholder:
Describe this member's responsibilities, boundaries, and collaboration style.

Example:
You are a frontend engineering agent responsible for turning product requirements into maintainable UI implementation.

## Responsibilities
Break down UI state, data flow, and interaction details; produce clear implementation plans or code.

## Working style
Pragmatic, stable, and consistent with existing components. Avoid over-design.

## Guardrails
When information is missing, state assumptions before proceeding and call out risks and verification steps.
teamPage.systemPrompt.title: System prompt
teamPage.teamProtocol.desc: Set shared guidelines that apply to the whole team in this session.
teamPage.teamProtocol.noProject: Select or create a project before editing the team protocol.
teamPage.teamProtocol.placeholder: Describe shared team rules, collaboration norms, handoff expectations, and review standards.
teamPage.teamProtocol.title: Team protocol
